allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('.github/workflows/build.yml','utf8'\);const lines=s.split\('\\n'\);let ok=true;lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{if\(/\\t/.test\(l\)\){console.log\('TAB at line',i+1\);ok=false}}\);console.log\(ok?'No tabs, basic check OK':'Found tabs'\);")
